calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

PMGI's motion for judgment on the pleadings is GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed. Judgment to be entered forthwith.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/NL)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on TUE-NOV-13-2018:
Alisa J. Kim, Esq. (T: 415.826.9160) - Special Appearance on behalf of the Plaintiff;
No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL LLC'S Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted.

Plaintiff' unopposed motion is granted. Plaintiff's Requests for Admission of facts (nos. 1 -8) and genuineness of documents (promissory note and disclosure statement; loan transaction history) served on Defendant Gennadiy Chernbelskiy by mail on August 14, 2018 ([to be] attached [to the order] as Exhibit A) are each deemed admitted by Defendant pursuant to CCP 2033.280. Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: L. Fong; Proceedings not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration
Off Calendar Nov-08-2018 Continued To Nov-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted

Continued to be heard on November 13, 2018. =(302/JPT)
